title: Skylety 6 Pcs Bear Clothes Basic Tee Shirt Classic Stuffed T Shirt Plush Crew Neck for Stuffed Bears Doll with 14 - 18 Inch, Bear Not Included(White)
features: Classic Tee: this stuffed t shirt fits most 14 - 18 inch plush toys, which can match well with pants, skirts and other clothing accessories to make your doll more cute and charming
Cozy Material: bear shirt is made of soft fabric with exquisite details, which is wear resistant, comfortable to wear and can be washed many times; It can serve your doll for a long time
Gift Choice: this bear doll t shirt is the best gift for doll lovers, you can give it to kids, family, friends, classmates and other people you care, they will love to receive this gift

Package Contains: you will receive 6 pieces classic shirts for bears, simple but stylish, which can be easily matched with other outfits; Sufficient quantity for your daily use and replacement; Note: the bear is not included in the package
Enjoy DIY: you can write some warm words, or doodle, draw and print your favorite pattern on doll shirts for bear, give full play to your imagination to make beautiful clothes for your doll
description: Features: If white shirts for dolls get dirty, you can wash them easily and quickly to keep clean. They keep your bear doll from dust. Clothes for bears are suitable for doll daily wear, themed shoots, party decorations, etc. To make it look more attractive. Specifications: Material: soft fabric Color: white Size: fit 14 - 18inch plush toy Package includes: 6 x Bear white tee Notes: Manual measurement, please allow slight errors on size. The color may exist a slight difference due to different screen displays.
